SubLayerProcessing.SQLScript:
SELECT
 sha2(NPI,256) as providerNPIKey
,NPI
,lastName
,firstName
,middleName
,orgName
,entityTypeDescription
,sha2(concat(
 ifnull(lastName,'|'),'|'
,ifnull(firstName,'|'),'|'
,ifnull(middleName,'|'),'|'
,ifnull(orgName,'|'),'|'
,ifnull(entityTypeDescription,'|')
 ),256) as fullRowHash
FROM providerNPI
UNION ALL
SELECT
 '-1' as providerNPIKey
,'unknown' as NPI
,'unknown' as lastName
,'unknown' as firstName
,'unknown' as middleName
,'unknown' as orgName
,'unknown' as entityTypeDescription
,'-1' as fullRowHash
SubLayerProcessing.MergeScript:
MERGE INTO DestinationTable t
USING (SELECT * FROM tempSQLScript)s
ON s.NPI=t.NPI
WHEN MATCHED AND t.fullRowHash <> s.fullRowHash
THEN UPDATE SET
 t.lastName = s.lastName
,t.firstName = s.firstName
,t.middleName = s.middleName
,t.orgName = s.orgName
,t.entityTypeDescription = s.entityTypeDescription
,t.fullRowHash = s.fullRowHash
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT
(
 providerNPIKey
,NPI
,lastName
,firstName
,middleName
,orgName
,entityTypeDescription
,fullRowHash
)
VALUES
(
 s.providerNPIKey
,s.NPI
,s.lastName
,s.firstName
,s.middleName
,s.orgName
,s.entityTypeDescription
,s.fullRowHash
)
